title: Expand coverage for state rebuilder
summary: Add targeted tests to raise overall coverage to >= 90% with state_rebuilder.py at >= 95%.

steps.description: Add coverage-focused tests for state rebuilder helpers, invariants, and replay paths.
Run verify-release and confirm coverage thresholds.

notes: Prefer deterministic tests that do not rely on external state.
Cover helper methods like parse/rotate/replay utilities.
